task_description: Complete quality upgrade of every module in MK OS: fix all bugs/warnings, add more knowledge, improve UI/UX, upgrade conversation mode, enhance Prometheus engine, improve code runner, math solver, Telegram integration, PC agent, and installer. Goal: make everything that exists GREAT while staying under 100MB total.

verification.summary: Build: zero errors, zero warnings with -Wall -Wextra. Tests: 11 passed, 0 failed, 160 assertions. Size: 53MB (well under 100MB limit). Knowledge: 10,069 lines across all .mk files (~9000+ facts). All security issues from review addressed. Temperature scheduling bug fixed. BirthChamber safety gate added.
